result.summary: OTOMOTO exposes a partner HTTP API for business listing/inventory integrations and a public MCP endpoint at https://www.otomoto.pl/mcp.
result.description: OTOMOTO is a Polish automotive marketplace for listing and browsing vehicles and related automotive offers. It is operated by Grupa OLX and provides business tooling for managing marketplace listings.

otomoto_api_client.label: OTOMOTO API client credentials (client_id and client_secret)
otomoto_api_client.setup: Register as an API partner via the [OTOMOTO API registration form](https://www.otomoto.pl/news/rejestracja-api). Access is for OTOMOTO business customers and integration companies; OTOMOTO reviews the application and, if approved, sends the API key together with its ID by email. The Postman onboarding collection shows token requests using `client_id` and `client_secret`, so keep both values for OAuth token exchange.

evidence: catalog: openai registries fact for https://www.otomoto.pl/mcp
catalog: openai registries fact for https://www.otomoto.pl/mcp (authTypes: NONE)
